item.title: Reports
item.description: DTEX publishes comprehensive insider risk management reports, from the cost of insider threats to nation-state operations and more.

item.title: Telecommunications
item.description: DTEX works with telecommunications companies to uplift insider risk management and protect sensitive data.

item.title: Insider Risk Management 101
item.description: DTEX details what insider risk management is and how to set up a successful program with a list of key resources to get started.

item.title: Leavers and Joiners
item.description: DTEX helps monitor departing and new employees, who are among the most common insider risks, to stop data exfiltration.

item.title: Shadow AI
item.description: DTEX makes Shadow AI detection achievable with proactive insider risk management and AI governance.

item.title: Why DTEX
item.description: Discover why DTEX is the trusted leader for proactive, AI-driven insider risk management and risk-adaptive data loss prevention.

item.title: DTEX i³ Services
item.description: DTEX Insider Threat Intelligence and Investigations accelerates insider risk management, turning data visibility into enterprise resilience.

item.title: DTEX in San Fransisco for RSAC 2026
item.description: Join us at RSA Conference 2026 to explore how our Risk-Adaptive Security Platform enhances human and AI security.

item.title: DTEX i³ Research
item.description: DTEX insider risk research hub brings the latest insider threat intelligence, threat advisories, and research on topics like cyber espionage, credential misuse, and data exfiltration.

item.title: Introducing DTEX System’s Enhanced Global Partner Program
item.description: Officially announcing an enhanced global channel program for our valued partner ecosystem to bring value to our customers.

item.title: Case Study: DTEX Helps a Global Financial Services Institution Mitigate Insider Threats
item.description: Read how DTEX helped one global financial services company choose the right data loss prevention solution for their needs.

item.title: Understanding Behavioral Intent Doesn’t Equal Invasive Surveillance
item.description: Adding behavioral analytics to your insider risk management program is a more proactive and effective solution than employees surveillance.

item.title: FDIC and OCC: What Financial Services Organizations Need to Know About the New Cybersecurity Incident Notification Rule
item.description: A new ruling from the FDIC aims to protect customers by requiring financial services organizations to report cybersecurity risk accordingly.

item.title: CISA Warns of Water, Wastewater Infrastructure Security Threats on Heels of Insider Threat Self-Assessment Tool Release
item.description: On Thursday, October 14th the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA), along with the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA), the National

item.title: Combating Shadow IT: A Customer Uses DTEX for Cybersecurity & More
item.description: Shadow IT” refers to non-IT department information systems that users in large enterprises sometimes deploy. Learn how DTEX helps a customer combat shadow IT.

item.title: AI Security
item.description: DTEX AI Security provides the guardrails to innovate confidently and securely. Govern who can use AI, how it should be used to protect data.

item.title: DLP
item.description: DTEX Risk-Adaptive DLP identifies and stops data loss events, with near-zero performance impact to endpoints or the network.

item.title: Platform Overview
item.description: Designed to collect the minimum amount of data for a near zero impact on the endpoint, DTEX identifies risks earlier to prevent data leaks.

item.title: Risk-Adaptive Data Protection: Beyond Traditional DLP PP
item.description: Legacy DLP solutions struggle with complexity, false positives, and gaps across cloud and endpoint environments. Learn how a risk-adaptive approach to Data Loss Prevention protects sensitive data without slowing your business down.

item.title: AI Security PPC
item.description: Learn how AI Security can protect your organization from risks associated with AI adoption while enhancing overall productivity.

item.title: Shadow AI PPC
item.description: Stay ahead of Shadow AI risks. Learn how to manage unsanctioned AI tools and safeguard your organization's sensitive information.

item.title: About DTEX
item.description: DTEX provides proactive insider risk management to stop data breaches. Learn more about DTEX and the people championing the mission.

item.title: Request a Demo
item.description: Request a demo to see how the DTEX Platform identifies insider risk earlier and maps behavior to malicious, careless or compromised activity.

item.title: Contact Us
item.description: Contact us and discover firsthand how the DTEX insider risk management platform can improve security visibility and stop data loss.

item.title: UAM
item.description: DTEX user activity monitoring (UAM) works to identify early risk indicators by increasing monitoring only when needed.

item.title: Financial Services
item.description: Used by banks across the world, DTEX helps financial institutions discern legitimate use from malicious through insider risk management.

item.title: Manufacturing
item.description: DTEX helps manufactures with insider risk management, protecting intellectual property and keeping systems running smoothly.

item.title: Pharma and Life Sciences
item.description: DTEX helps to secure data, monitor file access and protect intellectual property and sensitive research in pharmaceuticals and life sciences.

item.title: Government
item.description: DTEX works with government agencies to uplift insider risk management and supported a trusted workforce.

item.title: For Citrix
item.description: DTEX integrates with Citrix to extend visibility to analyze user behavior and protect data from insider threats.
